message:
refactor(highlighter): fix borrow split in apply_regex and clean up regex literals

Collect style operations into a Vec buffer before applying them so the
immutable borrow on text.plain() is released before calling text.stylize(),
resolving a potential borrow-checker conflict. Also convert two
ReprHighlighter HIGHLIGHTS patterns from backslash-heavy escaped strings
to r#"..."# raw string literals for readability without behavioral change.
Replace `while let Some(next) = iter.next()` with idiomatic `for next in iter`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
